name: @kwonlabs/openzl-wasm
description: WebAssembly port of Meta's OpenZL (Structured Data Compression Framework)

scripts.build: bun run build:wasm && bun run build:ts && bun run prepare:dist
scripts.build:ts: bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.js --target browser --minify && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.mjs --target browser --minify && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly

author: KwonMinchul Computer Labs, LLC.
